'''kagate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:outbye|outbye]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-g-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:outbye|outbye]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kagate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:kagate|kagate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kagatesher|kagatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kagatesherĂ«m|kagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kagatero|kagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kagateshĂ«|kagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kagateshĂ«m|kagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikagatero|gokikagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikagateshĂ«|gokikagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikagateshĂ«m|gokikagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokagankerom|gokagankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokagankeshĂ«|gokagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokagankeshĂ«m|gokagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokagankeya|gokagankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kagaterom|kagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kagatemu|kagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kagateya|kagateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikagaterom|gokikagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikagatemu|gokikagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikagateya|gokikagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:kagagate|kagagate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kagagatesher|kagagatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kagagatesherĂ«m|kagagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kagagatero|kagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kagagateshĂ«|kagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kagagateshĂ«m|kagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikagagatero|gokikagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikagagateshĂ«|gokikagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikagagateshĂ«m|gokikagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokagagankerom|gokagagankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokagagankeshĂ«|gokagagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokagagankeshĂ«m|gokagagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokagagankeya|gokagagankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kagagaterom|kagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kagagatemu|kagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kagagateya|kagagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikagagaterom|gokikagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikagagatemu|gokikagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikagagateya|gokikagagateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:kĂŠgĂŠte|kĂŠgĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kĂŠgĂŠtesher|kĂŠgĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m|kĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠgĂŠtero|kĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|kĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|kĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠgĂŠtero|gokikĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|gokikĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|gokikĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokĂŠgĂŠnkerom|gokĂŠgĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«|gokĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gokĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokĂŠgĂŠnkeya|gokĂŠgĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠgĂŠterom|kĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠgĂŠtemu|kĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kĂŠgĂŠteya|kĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠgĂŠterom|gokikĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠgĂŠtemu|gokikĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikĂŠgĂŠteya|gokikĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:kafgafte|kafgafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kafgaftesher|kafgaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafgaftesherĂ«m|kafgaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafgaftero|kafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kafgafteshĂ«|kafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafgafteshĂ«m|kafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafgaftero|gokikafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikafgafteshĂ«|gokikafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafgafteshĂ«m|gokikafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokafgafnkerom|gokafgafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokafgafnkeshĂ«|gokafgafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokafgafnkeshĂ«m|gokafgafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokafgafnkeya|gokafgafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafgafterom|kafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafgaftemu|kafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kafgafteya|kafgafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafgafterom|gokikafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafgaftemu|gokikafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikafgafteya|gokikafgafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
